subject: Stripe duplicate charge alert please ignore not ours
snippet: FYI quick note we got a stripe duplicate charge alert showing six hundred and twelve dollars (612 USD equals 2 x 306) on some other merchant account not ours we process card payments through Square Pearl Street refund went out yesterday at three hundred and fifteen dollars on Square
body: Hi Emily Kevin quick FYI on the stripe alert that popped on our shared bookkeeping dashboard this afternoon. It is flagging a six hundred and twelve dollar (612 USD) charge appearing twice as two by three hundred and six (612 equals 2 x 306). The merchant on the alert is not Porter Koval and we are not a stripe customer anyway. We process card payments through Square. The Pearl Street refund on RCP_INV_2026_09_1147 went out at three hundred and fifteen dollars yesterday via Square. Ignore the stripe noise it is not ours. Sandra.

subject: Urgent basement burst pipe quote please
snippet: Hi Emily found you through a neighbor on Allegheny (295 dollars). We have a burst pipe in the basement spraying near the laundry hookup and just need someone to cap the line this morning for two hundred ninety five dollars and add a real repair to your Monday route. Can you confirm.
body: Hi Emily my name is Darnell Briggs and I live on Allegheny Avenue a few blocks from where I hear your team is doing the garden workday Saturday. We have a burst pipe in the basement near the laundry hookup spraying water onto the slab. I would just need someone to come cap the line at the shutoff and add a proper repair to your Monday route. Heard from a neighbor your weekend rate for an emergency cap is two hundred ninety five dollars (295 USD). Can you confirm that price and that someone can swing by this morning before nine. I have got cash or zelle ready. Thank you very much for considering, my number is two one five five five five eight eight one two if it is easier to call.
